start_welcome:
👋 Business Translator Bot is running.

Once you connect your Telegram Business account, all incoming text messages will be translated and forwarded here.

Reply to any notification to send a translated response back to the user.
reply_sent: ✅ Your reply has been translated and sent to the user.
reply_not_found:
❌ Could not find the original conversation for this message.
Please reply directly to a translation notification.
only_text_messages: ℹ️ Only text messages are translated. Media and other content are not processed.
business_connection_enabled: ✅ Business account connected (ID: {connection_id}). The bot will now translate and forward incoming messages.
business_connection_disabled: ⚠️ Business account disconnected (ID: {connection_id}). The bot will no longer process messages for this account.
unknown_command: Unknown command. Send /start to see the welcome message.
help_text: ℹ️ Business Translator Bot • Incoming user messages are translated and sent here. • Reply to any notification to translate your response and send it to the user. • Only plain text messages are translated. Commands: /start — show welcome message /help — show this help /translator — translation settings
translator_already_exists: ℹ️ @{username} is already in the list.
translator_not_found: ℹ️ @{username} was not found in the list.
translator_invalid_username: ❌ Invalid username. Use letters, digits and _ (5–32 characters).
translator_list_empty: The list is empty — translation is inactive for everyone.
access_ask_username: Enter the username (without @) to grant access:
access_not_found: ℹ️ @{username} was not found in the access list.
access_remove_prompt: Choose a user to revoke access from:
translate_no_lang: No target language set — please choose one first.
